hero.title: Your Business on WhatsApp,
hero.subtitle: The plug-and-play platform that turns your WhatsApp Business into a complete booking system. No app development. No friction. Just results.
hero.trustedBy: Trusted by 500+ businesses across Latin America

painPoints.title: Sound Familiar?
painPoints.subtitle: Running bookings through WhatsApp chats is chaos. You deserve better.

items.title: Lost in the Chat
items.description: Bookings buried in endless message threads. Missed appointments, double bookings, and frustrated customers.

items.title: Apps Are Expensive
items.description: Building a custom booking app costs thousands and takes months. Most small businesses can't justify the investment.

items.title: Customers Won't Download
items.description: Your clients don't want another app on their phone. They're already on WhatsApp — meet them there.

items.title: No Visibility
items.description: No dashboard, no analytics, no way to track cancellations or manage your team's schedule efficiently.

solution.title: The Best of Both Worlds
solution.subtitle: Customers book through WhatsApp. You manage everything from a powerful backoffice.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp for Customers
whatsapp.description: Your clients book, confirm, and get reminders through the app they already use every day. No downloads, no sign-ups.

backoffice.title: Backoffice for Your Team
backoffice.description: A clean, powerful dashboard to manage services, schedules, bookings, and your team — all in one place.

howItWorks.title: Up and Running in 4 Steps
howItWorks.subtitle: From zero to receiving bookings in less than 15 minutes.

steps.title: Connect WhatsApp
steps.description: Link your WhatsApp Business account with a single click. We handle all the technical setup.

steps.title: Choose Your Preset
steps.description: Select your business type and we'll auto-configure services, hours, and messages for you.

steps.title: Customize Basics
steps.description: Fine-tune your services, availability, and branding. Everything is pre-filled — just adjust what you need.

steps.title: Start Receiving Bookings
steps.description: Go live and let your customers book through WhatsApp. You'll see everything in your dashboard.

features.title: Everything You Need to Manage Bookings
features.subtitle: Built for small businesses that want to professionalize their WhatsApp booking experience.

items.title: WhatsApp-Native Booking
items.description: Customers book directly through WhatsApp with guided flows. No external links or apps needed.

items.title: Automated Setup
items.description: Choose your business type and get a pre-configured workspace with services, hours, and messages ready to go.

items.title: Smart Presets
items.description: Industry-specific templates for barbershops, clinics, salons, and more. Start with best practices built in.

items.title: Service Management
items.description: Create and manage your services with duration, pricing, and availability. Keep everything organized.

items.title: Booking Dashboard
items.description: See all your bookings at a glance. Filter by date, status, or service. Confirm, reschedule, or cancel with one click.

items.title: Auto Notifications
items.description: Confirmation messages, reminders, and cancellation notices sent automatically through WhatsApp.

items.title: Multi-Tenant Platform
items.description: Built as a true SaaS platform. Each business gets its own isolated workspace and configuration.

items.title: Future-Ready
items.description: Payments, commerce, loyalty programs, and delivery modules are on the roadmap. Your setup grows with you.

verticals.title: Built for Your Industry
verticals.subtitle: Pre-configured presets for the businesses that rely on WhatsApp the most.

items.title: Barbershops
items.description: Haircuts, beard trims, combos — with preset durations and smart scheduling for walk-in friendly businesses.

items.title: Clinics & Aesthetics
items.description: Consultations, treatments, follow-ups — with longer time slots and professional confirmation flows.

items.title: Beauty Salons
items.description: Nails, hair, makeup — manage multiple service providers and their individual schedules.

items.title: Veterinary Clinics
items.description: Pet appointments, vaccinations, check-ups — with client and pet tracking built in.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade as you grow. No surprises.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Ventry.

items.question: Do my customers need to install an app?
items.answer: No! Your customers book directly through WhatsApp, which they already have. No downloads, no sign-ups, no friction.

items.question: Can I use my current WhatsApp Business number?
items.answer: Yes, absolutely. You connect your existing WhatsApp Business account during setup. We work with your current number.

items.question: Can I customize the messages sent to customers?
items.answer: Yes. You can customize confirmation messages, reminders, and cancellation notices. We provide templates to get you started quickly.

items.question: Can my team manage bookings too?
items.answer: Yes. You can invite team members to your backoffice with different roles (Owner, Admin, Staff). Everyone sees the same booking calendar.

items.question: Is Ventry only for bookings?
items.answer: For now, yes — bookings are our MVP focus. But we're building modules for payments, e-commerce, loyalty programs, and more. Your setup will grow with the platform.

items.question: Will you support payments in the future?
items.answer: Yes! Payment processing, online commerce, and delivery coordination are on our roadmap. Early adopters will get access first.

finalCta.title: Launch Your WhatsApp Booking System in Minutes
finalCta.subtitle: Join hundreds of businesses already using Ventry to manage their bookings professionally.
finalCta.privacy: No spam. No credit card required.

footer.description: The plug-and-play WhatsApp Business platform for modern small businesses.
